title: phyllagathis tetrandra
intro: Phyllagathis tetrandra, also known as the "wild garlic" or "mukunti" in some regions, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllagathis tetrandra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to create teas, tonics, and ointments for treating various ailments.
